C:\temp\config.json

commands.description:
Exports all active carriers from an environment to a json 
file. To see what an carrier is check 
[link]https://dev.azure.com/ec4u/Dynamics%20DevLab/_wiki/wikis/Dynamics-DevLab.w
iki/111/Solution-Concept[/]

commands.name: solution-version

options.name: --build
options.description:
Increment the build version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 
1.0.1.0

options.name: --major
options.description:
Increment the major version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 
2.0.0.0

options.name: --minor
options.description:
Increment the minor version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 
1.1.0.0

options.name: --revision
options.description:
Increment the revision version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 
1.0.0.1

arguments.name: Solution
arguments.description:
The unique name of the solution to increment 
version

commands.description: Increments the solution version by given flag

commands.name: createworkflowstate

options.name: --output
options.description:
Full path to the output file, e.g. 
C:\temp\config.json

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
If set to true the output file will be overwritten if it 
exists

options.name: --publishers
options.description:
Comma separated list of publisher names to consider. 
Wildcards (%) are allowed

options.name: --solutions
options.description:
Comma separated list of solution uniquenames to consider.
Wildcards (%) are allowed

options.name: --tablereport
options.description:
Print a table report to the console after the config file
has been created

commands.description: Creates a workflowstate configuration file

options.description: Report only what would be removed

options.description: Also remove Entities (experimental)!

arguments.name: SourceSolutions
arguments.description:
The unique name of the solutions where the elements are 
read out, can be comma separeted if multiple

The unique name of the solution where elements that are 
also contained in the source solution are removed

existing
